title: [IOS]Analytics - Feedback Opened
scenario: Feedback form (Mopinion) opened event logged as Firebase event "feedback_opened" in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Open the side menu or settings menu (e.g., tap the hamburger icon or profile icon).
4. Locate and tap the 'Feedback' or 'Send Feedback' option to open the Feedback form (Mopinion).
expected: The Feedback form (Mopinion) opens successfully. The Firebase event "feedback_opened" is logged and the event count updates in Firebase Analytics after a few hours.
